steps.title: Use the height clue
steps.content: The father raises a kite "within minutes into the wind," and the result is that the kite is "so high" Gogol must tip his head back to see it. In this setting, the word describes a physical action that moves the kite upward into the sky.

steps.title: Match upward motion
steps.content:
• Choice A - Strengthen: To strengthen is to make something more powerful or durable, but the sentence is about changing the kite's position.
  • Choice C - Celebrate: To celebrate is to honor or mark an occasion, which does not fit a kite moving into the wind.
  • Choice D - Group: To group is to collect things together, and the sentence describes only one kite being sent upward.
The needed meaning is the one that describes moving something higher. The answer is B.
